insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great accomplishment starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only earn your first points, but also gain momentum and insight into areas where you need to focus. By taking that initial step and engaging with the material, you'll be able to identify your strengths and weaknesses, setting yourself up for a strong foundation to build upon and improve your scores in the days to come.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
